category_sources: Official Lima docs describe installing and configuring Lima for VM-based tooling.
display_name_sources: Official site and repository use Lima.
docs_sources: source_facts.homepage is the official Lima site with a dedicated /docs documentation section.
repo_sources: source_facts.repo already supplies https://github.com/lima-vm/lima; repo returned null per instruction.
tags_sources: source_facts.executables lists limactl, lima, and container-related wrappers such as docker.lima and podman.lima.
